_comment: Sean's planner data. Edit this file to change your program, schedule, or notes. The email script and widget both read from here.

blocks.label: Dogs, get ready, out the door
Dogs, get ready, out the door
Dogs, get ready, out the door

_program_notes: 6-day Push/Pull/Legs split (A/B variations) for 45 lb dumbbells + bench. Each muscle group hit twice weekly from different angles. Thursday is true rest. Designed for advanced lifter working around load cap using tempo, unilateral work, mechanical drop sets, and myo-reps. Week 4 is a deload. Program_start_date is used to calculate which week you're in.

exercises.name: DB Bench Press
exercises.detail: 45s @ 45lb. 3-sec lowering, no pause, 1-sec up. Rest 90s.
exercises.progression: When you hit 10 reps all sets, add a 5th set next week.

exercises.name: Incline DB Press (30° bench)
exercises.detail: Controlled, full stretch at bottom. Rest 90s.
exercises.progression: Add 1 rep per set each week until 12, then add tempo.

exercises.name: DB Flye → DB Press (mechanical drop)
exercises.detail: On bench. Flyes to near failure, immediately transition to flat press for max reps. Rest 2 min.
exercises.progression: Add flye reps weekly.

exercises.name: Mechanical Drop: DB Skull Crusher → Close-Grip Press
exercises.detail: Lying on bench. Skull crushers to near failure, immediately transition to close-grip press for as many reps as possible. Rest 2 min.
exercises.progression: Add reps to the skullcrusher portion.

exercises.name: DB Row (single-arm, bench-supported)
exercises.detail: 2-sec lowering, 1-sec squeeze at top. Full ROM. Rest 60s between arms.
exercises.progression: Add 1 rep per arm per week up to 12.

exercises.name: Chest-Supported DB Row (incline bench face-down)
exercises.detail: Face down on incline bench at 30°. Row to lower ribs, pause 1s. Rest 90s.
exercises.progression: Add a 2-sec lowering phase when hitting 12 easily.

exercises.name: DB Pullover
exercises.detail: On bench, single DB held with both hands. 3-sec lowering, full stretch over head. Great for lats when pull-ups aren't available.
exercises.progression: Add reps up to 15, then add a paused rep in stretched position.

exercises.name: DB Hammer Curl → DB Curl (mechanical drop)
exercises.detail: Hammer curls to near failure, immediately switch to standard curls. Rest 2 min.
exercises.progression: Add 1 rep to the hammer portion weekly.

exercises.name: DB Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.detail: Rear foot elevated on bench. 3-sec lowering. DBs at sides. Rest 90s between legs.
exercises.progression: Add a 2-sec pause at the bottom when hitting 12.

exercises.name: DB Goblet Squat (paused)
exercises.detail: One DB at chest. 2-sec pause in the hole each rep. Depth over weight. Rest 90s.
exercises.progression: Extend pause to 3 sec, then 4 sec.

exercises.name: DB Walking Lunge
exercises.detail: DBs at sides. Full step, knee lightly touches floor. Rest 2 min.
exercises.progression: Add 2 steps per set per week up to 30 total.

exercises.name: Single-Leg DB Calf Raise
exercises.detail: Stand on a step, DB in one hand. 2-sec pause at top each rep. Rest 60s.
exercises.progression: Add reps up to 20, then add a 2-sec lowering.

Push B.focus: Shoulder-emphasis push: overhead pressing + lateral delts + triceps

exercises.name: Seated DB Shoulder Press
exercises.detail: Seated on bench, back supported. 3-sec lowering. Rest 90s.
exercises.progression: Add reps, then add a paused rep at top when hitting 10.

exercises.name: Arnold Press
exercises.detail: Seated. Start with palms facing you, rotate as you press. Full shoulder ROM. Rest 90s.
exercises.progression: Add reps, then slow the rotation.

exercises.name: DB Lateral Raise (myo-rep)
exercises.detail: Hit 15 reps to near-failure, rest 15s, then 3 clusters of 5 reps with 15s rest between. Light weight, strict form.
exercises.progression: Increase the activation set by 1 rep weekly.

exercises.name: Incline DB Press (45° steeper)
exercises.detail: Steeper incline hits upper chest / front delts. Rest 90s.
exercises.progression: Add reps, then add tempo.

exercises.name: DB Overhead Tricep Extension (both hands, one DB)
exercises.detail: Seated or standing. One DB held with both hands behind head. Full stretch. Rest 60s.
exercises.progression: Add reps up to 15, then add 2-sec stretched pause.

Pull B.focus: Arm + rear delt emphasis pull: rows + rear delts + bicep volume

exercises.name: DB Row (both arms, bent-over)
exercises.detail: Bent at 45°, both DBs. Row to hips. 2-sec lowering, 1-sec squeeze. Rest 90s.
exercises.progression: Add reps up to 12, then add pause.

exercises.name: DB Rear Delt Fly (chest-supported)
exercises.detail: Face down on incline bench. Light weight, pinkies up at top, squeeze shoulder blades. Rest 60s.
exercises.progression: Add reps to 20 before increasing weight.

exercises.name: DB High Pull / Upright Row
exercises.detail: Standing. Pull DBs up toward chin, elbows leading. Hits rear delts and traps. Rest 60s.
exercises.progression: Add reps, then add a 1-sec hold at top.

exercises.name: DB Incline Curl (bench at 45°)
exercises.detail: Lie back on incline bench. Arms hang straight down. 3-sec lowering. Brutal stretch on biceps. Rest 90s.
exercises.progression: Add 1 rep per week up to 12.

exercises.name: DB Concentration Curl
exercises.detail: Seated, elbow braced on inner thigh. Strict, controlled. Rest 30s between arms.
exercises.progression: Add reps to 15, then add a peak squeeze pause.

Legs B.focus: Posterior chain emphasis: hamstrings, glutes, calves

exercises.name: DB Romanian Deadlift
exercises.detail: 4-sec lowering. DBs in front. Push hips back, feel deep hamstring stretch. Rest 2 min.
exercises.progression: Add reps to 12 before returning to 3-sec tempo with more reps.

exercises.name: DB Hip Thrust (shoulders on bench)
exercises.detail: Shoulders on bench, DB across hips. Drive through heels, 2-sec squeeze at top. Rest 90s.
exercises.progression: Extend pause to 3 sec, then 4 sec.

exercises.name: DB Reverse Lunge (glute focus)
exercises.detail: Step back into lunge. Long step for glute emphasis. Rest 90s between legs.
exercises.progression: Add reps to 12, then add a pause at bottom.

exercises.name: DB Single-Leg RDL
exercises.detail: One DB in opposite hand of standing leg. 3-sec lowering. Focus on balance and stretch.
exercises.progression: Add reps up to 12, then add pause at bottom.

exercises.name: DB Calf Raise (both legs, paused)
exercises.detail: Both DBs at sides, raise up on toes, pause 1 sec. Rest 60s.
exercises.progression: Add reps, then go single-leg.

exercises.name: Rest day
exercises.detail: No lifting today. Active recovery only — walking the dogs counts. Sleep matters more than any single workout.

_week_modifiers_comment: Applied to all exercises based on which week of the 4-week cycle you're in.

1.label: Week 1 — Accumulation
1.note: Stick to prescribed reps. Focus on form and full ROM.

2.label: Week 2 — Intensification
2.note: Add 1 rep per set compared to week 1, OR slow the tempo by 1 sec on the eccentric.

3.label: Week 3 — Overload
3.note: Push to the top of each rep range. On mechanical drop sets and myo-reps, extend by 1 round or 1 cluster.

4.label: Week 4 — Deload
4.note: Reduce all sets by 1 and reps by ~30%. This is recovery — don't skip it. Next week you'll feel rebuilt.
